# Create Test Cases

Use the canonical workspace skill at `.agents/skills/create-test-cases/SKILL.md`.

Task input: `$1`

## Required behavior

1. Read `.agents/skills/create-test-cases/SKILL.md` before designing or refactoring test cases.
2. Produce agent-compatible steps and expected results using the repository's test case design rules.
3. Check existing tracker coverage before adding or changing scenarios.
4. Keep scenario IDs, priorities, feature areas, workflows, subsections, and tracker details consistent with the current repository conventions.

## Final response

Summarize the created or updated scenarios, coverage gaps closed, tracker/spec files touched, and any unresolved assumptions.
